ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname or alias of the participant */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the affiliation of the participant */,
  "provided_tshirt_size" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a t-shirt has been provided to the participant */,
  "mobile_number" TEXT /* Mobile number of the participant for communication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Dietary restrictions of the participant */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the participant */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation_id") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation (e.g., Galois, Oxford) */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of affiliation (e.g., University, Company) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the affiliation */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the affiliation */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the affiliation */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Keynote Speech, Workshop) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Workshop, Keynote, Networking) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or agenda of the event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees allowed */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main speaker */,
  "session_materials_url" TEXT /* URL for accessing session materials online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Speaker, Attendee, Organizer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of responsibility (e.g., Senior, Junior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_events" (
  "participant_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the participant for the event */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the participant attended the event */,
  "registration_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant registered for the event */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant checked in at the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_events_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_events_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES participant_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent to the participant */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the message was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., Sent, Not Sent) */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., SMS, Email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tshirt_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each t-shirt request */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "tshirt_size" TEXT /* Size of the t-shirt requested (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "provision_date" TEXT /* Date when the t-shirt was provided */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the t-shirt request (e.g., Pending, Fulfilled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tshirt_requests_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency contact */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "contact_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the emergency contact to the participant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_contacts_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session material */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., Handout, Slides) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was uploaded */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_materials_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Attended, Absent) */,
  "attendance_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant attended the session */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant left the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_attendance_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
